explanation.name: 📖 Explanation
explanation.template:
As a {persona_name}, please explain the following concept:

Concept: {concept}
Context: {context}

Please ensure your explanation:
- Uses {language_level} language
- Has {technical_depth} level of technical depth
- {include_examples_text} examples
- Maintains a {tone} tone
- Provides {detail_level} level of detail
- Uses {jargon_level} jargon
- Follows a {structure} structure

Additional instructions: {additional_instructions}

problem_solving.name: 🔧 Problem Solving

code_generation.name: 💻 Code Generation

defaults.requirements: Write clean, readable code with error handling

analysis.name: 📈 Analysis
analysis.template:
As {persona_name}, analyze the following:

Data/Information: {data}
Analysis Goals: {goals}
Constraints: {constraints}

Analysis requirements:
- {technical_depth} depth of analysis
- {detail_level} level of detail
- Use {structure} structure
- {include_examples_text} examples
- Maintain {tone} tone

Analysis:

defaults.constraints: No specific constraints for this analysis

creative_writing.name: ✍️ Creative Writing

brainstorming.name: 💡 Brainstorming
